topic: The toilet water ripples every night at the same time, as if something moves below.
title: My Toilet Rippled Every Night At The Same Time | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every night at the same hour, my toilet water rippled on its own.
scenes.image_prompt: A still toilet bowl with faint concentric ripples on the water surface, dim bathroom light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was the only toilet in my quiet second floor flat.
scenes.image_prompt: A plain white toilet in a small tiled bathroom, frosted window, low gray light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Three in the morning. I woke to the same soft sound.
scenes.image_prompt: A dark bathroom at night, faint light catching the rim of a toilet bowl, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The water moved as if something stirred far below.
scenes.image_prompt: Close view of rippling water inside a toilet bowl, a faint dark depth beneath, cold dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stood frozen in the doorway.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom doorway looking toward a dimly lit toilet, shadows pooling on the floor, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each ripple rose, paused, then sank, like slow breathing.
scenes.image_prompt: Ripples spreading across toilet water and pulling inward, faint reflection of the ceiling, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I dropped a coin in to mark the depth.
scenes.image_prompt: A small coin sinking into the water of a toilet bowl, faint glint, dark interior, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning the coin was gone. The ripples never stopped.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty toilet bowl with still water and no coin visible, deep shadow under the rim, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I shut the lid and stacked heavy books on top.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed toilet lid weighed down with a stack of old books, dim bathroom light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At three the books slid off. The lid lifted slightly.
scenes.image_prompt: Books toppled on a bathroom floor beside a toilet with its lid raised a crack, faint light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I taped my phone above it to film overnight.
scenes.image_prompt: A phone mounted on a small tripod aimed at a toilet bowl, recording light glowing, dark bathroom, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The footage showed a hand reaching up, then pulling back down.
scenes.image_prompt: A blurry grainy still of a pale shape just below the water of a toilet bowl, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
